visual_description: In a dimly lit nighttime scene, a man in a dark jacket gets out of the driver's side of a black car. The audio consists of ambient sounds from a quiet, outdoor nighttime environment. The only distinct sound is the solid, heavy thud of a car door closing, suggesting a vehicle is parked in a still, possibly remote, location. The car is parked on the side of a road, with dark trees and bushes in the background. A few out-of-focus streetlights illuminate the dark surroundings. In the top left corner, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The camera is positioned at a medium distance, capturing the man's action and the car. The man, now fully out of the car, turns and walks away from the vehicle. The camera follows him, shifting to a closer, over-the-shoulder shot from the perspective of someone inside the car. The man has a serious expression as he moves into the darkness. The "风行网" text remains on screen. The shot cuts to a close-up of the man's face.
